analysis.name: Jupiter
analysis.summary: JUP近期因市场杠杆清洗、Grayscale报告及Securitize代币化股票上线等利好上涨，但24小时回调3.6%。基本面扎实，但估值较高，流通市值7.17亿美元，FDV 14.8亿美元。短期涨幅已大，建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.18美元支撑或出现重大解锁/抛售

catalysts: 市场杠杆清洗后资金回流优质DeFi项目
Securitize在Jupiter DEX上线代币化股票
Jupiter收购RainFi P2P借贷协议，扩展DeFi生态

latestNews.title: Jupiter (JUP) Surges 18% Amid Market-Wide Leverage Flush
latestNews.reason: 杠杆清洗后资金流入JUP，显示其作为优质资产被认可

latestNews.title: Jupiter (JUP) Volatility: Grayscale Report Sparks 3.34% Move
Jupiter Price Prediction: JUP recovery gains traction as Securitize launches tokenized equities on DEX
latestNews.reason: 代币化股票上线增加Jupiter实际用例

latestNews.title: Strategic Mastery: Jupiter’s Acquisition of RainFi P2P Lending Protocol Transforms Solana DeFi
latestNews.reason: 收购扩展DeFi生态，增强长期价值

fundamentals: Solana上最大的DEX聚合器，支持兑换、限价单、DCA、跨链桥等
已推出永续合约测试版
代币总供应量100亿，流通33.2亿，流通率33.2%
历史最高价2美元，当前0.216美元，跌幅89%
marketRead: 24小时价格下跌3.6%，但7日上涨0.7%，14日上涨26%，30日上涨23%
DEX流动性4046万美元，24小时交易量7.17万美元，流动性充足但交易量偏低
近期从0.14美元附近反弹至0.22美元，涨幅约57%，短期超买
risks: FDV较高，流通市值仅占FDV的48%，未来解锁压力大
24小时价格回调，短期获利盘可能涌出
DEX交易量偏低，价格发现可能不充分
整体市场情绪仍不稳定，杠杆清洗后可能反复
watchlist: JUP价格能否站稳0.20美元上方
是否有新的解锁或抛售公告
Jupiter产品更新及用户增长数据
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinMarketCap、DexScreener、Google News等公开来源
新闻时效性参差不齐，部分为预测性内容
DEX价格与CEX存在差异，以CEX为准

profile.name: Jupiter
profile.description: Jupiter is a cryptocurrency exchange platform on the Solana blockchain, offering features such as token swapping, limit orders, dollar-cost averaging, and a bridge for asset transfers to Solana. It provides users with tools to find the best trading prices and includes a beta version for perpetual futures trading. Jupiter finds the best price route for your swap by aggregating all the major liquidity sources on Solana.
